name: BI-RADS Assessment Category Codes
description: SNOMED CT and LOINC codes for BI-RADS (Breast Imaging-Reporting and Data System) assessment categories 0 through 6. Used in breast cancer screening (BCS) follow-up and supplemental data evaluation for mammography results.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: BI-RADS Category 0 — Incomplete: need additional imaging evaluation
BI-RADS Category 5 — Highly suggestive of malignancy
Breast Imaging Reporting and Data System assessment (BI-RADS)
